groups.label: benign
groups.description: Benign lawful gun usage - sport/target shooting, hunting, museum/historical display, collecting, Olympic competition, safety training

groups.label: harmful
groups.description: Harmful, threatening, or violent context - gun used for robbery, assault, threats, intimidation, violence, crime

sentences.text: The robber threatened everyone in the bank with a gun, demanding all the cash from the safe.
She froze in terror as the masked man pointed a gun at her during the late-night mugging.
The gang member waved a gun in the air to intimidate the crowd, causing panic and chaos.
